## Audit Finding Details

**Document ID**: <!-- e.g., DOC123, FDA_2024_001 -->

**Manifest Path**: <!-- Path to manifest JSON file, e.g., manifests/DOC123.json -->

**Finding Summary**: <!-- Brief description of the finding -->

**Severity**: <!-- Choose one: Low | Medium | High | Critical -->

**Category (Fault Line)**: <!-- Choose one or more -->
- [ ] DOJ Certification
- [ ] IRB Consent (28 C.F.R. Part 46)
- [ ] Infrastructure Policy
- [ ] Federal Grant Incentives

## Evidence

**Document Checksum (SHA-256)**: <!-- First 16 characters or full checksum -->

**Page/Section Reference**: <!-- Where in the document is the issue located? -->

**Excerpt or Description**:
```
<!-- Paste relevant excerpt or describe the issue -->
```

## Impact Assessment

**Legal Risk**: <!-- Low | Medium | High | Critical -->

**Compliance Impact**: <!-- Which regulations or policies are affected? -->

**Urgency**: <!-- How soon does this need to be addressed? -->
